mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blocked_user(blocker_id, blocked_id, create_time) VALUES(#{blockerId}, #{blockedId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM blocked_user WHERE blocker_id = #{blockerId} AND blocked_id = #{blockedId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blocked_user WHERE blocker_id = #{blockerId} AND blocked_id = #{blockedId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blocked_user WHERE (blocker_id = #{userId1} AND blocked_id = #{userId2}) OR (blocker_id = #{userId2} AND blocked_id = #{userId1})
